modelName.title: Embedding model resource
modelName.description: The unique identifier or resource name of the embedding model to use for query and context vectorization.

banner.title: Embedding model resource
banner.text: Select the embedding model to use for vector generation.

vectorStoreName.title: Vector store resource
vectorStoreName.description: The name of the vector store resource used to store and retrieve indexed documents.

banner.title: Vector store
banner.text: Specify the vector store to retrieve relevant documents.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.description: A list of parameters that will be used as metadata for retrieval operations. Values can use Expression Language (EL).

key.title: Parameter name
key.description: The name of the parameter to be used as a filter during vector search.

value.title: Parameter value
value.description: The value of the parameter. You can use Expression Language (EL) for dynamic resolution.

encode.title: Encode value
encode.description: Whether to encode the value before indexing, typically used for sensitive information.

resultsAttribute.title: Results attribute
resultsAttribute.description: The context attribute where the retrieved results will be stored after vector search. This will be used later by the prompt template.

banner.title: Results attribute
banner.text: Where to store the retrieved results in context.

promptExpression.title: Prompt expression
promptExpression.description: Expression (EL or JSONPath) used to extract the prompt from the request or context for similarity search.

banner.title: Prompt expression
banner.text: Where to extract the question for vector search.

promptTemplate.title: Prompt template
promptTemplate.description: The prompt template used to guide the language model's generation. You can use EL syntax to include dynamic data such as questions or retrieved context.

banner.title: Prompt template
banner.text: Define how the model should respond using a custom template.
